Name: Send Result
Description: Read a file from the operation's staging directory and write it to the operation Output so the trigger caller receives it. The file is stored as a raw Buffer — no base64 encoding in the pipeline.

SettingsInputs.Name: FilePath
SettingsInputs.Description: Path to the file in staging (relative or absolute)

SettingsInputs.Name: OutputKey
SettingsInputs.Description: Key in the operation Output object (default: ResultFile)

StateOutputs.Name: BytesSent
StateOutputs.Description: Size of the result file in bytes

StateOutputs.Name: DurationMs
StateOutputs.Description: Time to read and package the result
